authentication_requirement: BLS v1 public data requests require no registration; v2 registration key use is optional and local-only through FINNEWS_BLS_API_KEY.
known_limitations: API rate rules and registration behavior may change.
Series definitions and seasonal-adjustment metadata must be reviewed before expansion.

official_source: CFTC Commitments of Traders public reporting
authentication_requirement: No token is stored or required for the configured public COT PRE profile.
known_limitations: COT datasets lack one universal primary key across all rows and formats.
Market names and code fields can change and require conservative logical keys.

authentication_requirement: A free local FINNEWS_EIA_API_KEY is required for live smoke; the tracked config stores only the env var name.
known_limitations: Live smoke is blocked when the local key is absent.
Route/facet schemas can vary by dataset and require profile-specific validation.

official_owner: Office of the Federal Register and U.S. Government Publishing Office
authentication_requirement: No API key is required for the configured metadata profile.
known_limitations: FederalRegister.gov is informational and not the official legal edition.
Regulatory metadata can change and must retain point-in-time provenance.

official_owner: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
official_source: Federal Reserve Board press release RSS feed
authentication_requirement: No authentication or API key identified for the RSS feed.
known_limitations: Feed availability and validator behavior may change.
Live-smoke success does not imply production availability.

authentication_requirement: No API key is required; local contact metadata is required for the declared User-Agent before any SEC smoke request.
known_limitations: Local contact metadata is required before live smoke testing.
Live-smoke success does not imply production availability.
